title: New fire station opened at Mavoor
summary: The new facility, opened by Chief Minister Pinarayi Vijayan online, is expected to cater for 15 local bodies in Kozhikode and Malappuram districts

title: Saree distribution at Puthuppally Fest by Congress MLA Chandy Oommen triggers political row
summary: CPI(M) accuses Chandy Oommen of attempting to influence voters ahead of Assembly polls. MLA says he is willing to make public all accounts related to the event

title: Kerala High Court refuses to entertain fresh plea on The Kerala Story 2-Goes Beyond
summary: Bench says it will be improper for the court to entertain the plea, since a writ petition and an appeal regarding the matter are already pending before the court

title: GBA official arrested while accepting ₹10,000 bribe
BSNL commissions 6,132 4G sites across Andhra Pradesh
Construction of three seaports will be completed by end of 2026, says Infrastructure Minister Janardhan Reddy
summary: The integration of ports with a proper logistics network will establish Andhra Pradesh as a leading maritime gateway of India, he says

title: Live phone-in classes for SSLC students on KITE Victers
Experts call for bridging engineering, technology and brain sciences at NIMHANS conference
summary: The conference highlights the role of cognitive neuroscience and multidisciplinary research in strengthening mental health care systems
